author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
World of Tanks: Modern Armor - Special Event: Banners Of Valor | PS5 Games
Raise your flag and join the fight in Banners of Valor!

This Special Event honors patriotic celebrations all around the world. Choose your nation, hit the battlefield, and earn exclusive Flag Currency to unlock powerful Premium tanks, Commanders, and rewards inspired by each nation’s history.

Prove your worth in this year’s themed challenges and enjoy the return of the War Heroes: Valor trading cards, a collection of the most memorable events in World War II history. 

Forge your legacy!

Banners of Valor is available from June 30 through July 20 on World of Tanks Modern Armor.

text:
Hunting Simulator 3 - SimFauna Explanation | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10010914

Discover SimFauna, our advanced ecosystem simulation system that brings wildlife to life with realistic behaviors, life cycles, genetics, and dynamic predator-prey interactions.

Learn how your hunting decisions influence animal populations and shape future generations, creating a deeper and more immersive hunting experience.

This is just the beginning, stay tuned for more behind the scenes looks at Hunting Simulator 3 in the coming months.

Coming this Fall on PlayStation 5. Wishlist now!

text:
Momento - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
Momento is OUT NOW on PlayStation!
Play Now: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018470/﻿

Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the choices you make play out over the course of a lifetime! Decorate your room, choose which items are important to you, and discover how the objects you choose will alter the course of the story, in a winding ode to the power of everyday things.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Guns of Eschaton - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016017

Guns of Eschaton is a soulslike FPS set in an occult Wild West created by the late, renowned writer and worldbuilder Viktor Antonov (Half-Life 2, Dishonoured, Prey, Fallout 4, Wolfenstein: The New Order). 

Here history burns, legends bleed, and every gunfight feels personal. This is not a fast-paced shooter where victory comes through reflexes alone. Every bullet matters. Every decision has consequences. Solo or in co-op, gunslinger, go West and die with the country.

Coming to PlayStation 5. Wishlist today
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016017

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Helldivers 2 - Campaign Brief: Termicide 2.0 | PS5 & PC Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/helldivers-2/

Frontlines of Freedom update: a decisive victory for the Helldivers has yielded further intelligence on the newly formed “Voids” across the galaxy.

Helldivers are now deployed to construct the new and improved TCS 2.0 - an impenetrable wall against Terminid advances. Successful completion will add the R-4 Hyena Marksman Rifle to your arsenal.

Hold the line. Secure the galaxy.

HELLDIVERS™ 2 is Out Now on PS5® and PC

#ps5 #ps5games #pcgames #Helldivers2 #FrontlinesOfFreedom

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - × Fist Of The North Star: Hokuto No Ken: Kenshiro | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/fatal-fury-city-of-the-wolves/

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star has arrived in City of the Wolves! Character trailer is now available!

Kenshiro  (Voice Actors: Clayton Alexander)

Post-apocalyptic savior with seven distinctive scars carved onto his chest. As sole successor to the ultimate assassination art, Hokuto Shinken, he treads a perilous path; indeed, a dangerous yearning for Hokuto Shinken by forces unknown is what calls him to the forsaken City of the Wolves in the first place.Though worlds collide and divide, Kenshiro's crusade against evil never wavers. To the weak, lost, and broken, he extends a helping hand; to those who prey on them, he metes out merciless justice. 

©SNK CORPORATION ALL RIGHTS RESERVED. 
©Buronson & Tetsuo Hara/Coamix, HOKUTO Committee
